title: Love Bonda
overview: Passionate about films, a popular movie scriptwriter and lyricist, after several bad dating experiences and a troubled married life, turns into a filmmaker. At this juncture, he loves a mentally depressed woman, but even after his efforts to support her, she ends up committing suicide.
